creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Add --new-instance or --no-remote e.g., 

  $ firefox --new-instance -P foo

  $ mkdir /path/to/foo
  $ firefox --new-remote --profile /path/to/foo
  $ rm -fr /path/to/foo

The behavior didn't change since Firefox 13.0, see https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=716110
